no-restricted-syntax.selector: VariableDeclarator > MemberExpression[object.name='supabase'][property.name='rpc'], VariableDeclarator > TSAsExpression > MemberExpression[object.name='supabase'][property.name='rpc'], VariableDeclarator > TSAsExpression > TSAsExpression > MemberExpression[object.name='supabase'][property.name='rpc']
no-restricted-syntax.message: Never assign supabase.rpc to a variable. It is a prototype method (`return this.rest.rpc(...)`), so detaching it makes `this` undefined and the call throws TypeError BEFORE issuing any request — silently, with any fallback below unreachable. This shipped broken in 4 places (2026-07-15). Use rpcUntyped() from @/lib/supabase, or call supabase.rpc(...) directly.
